text: Schedule a meeting with Sarah and John tomorrow at 3pm for 1 hour
notes: Should extract attendees, infer end time from 1-hour duration

text: Cancel my dentist appointment on Friday
notes: Needs to locate the event by title keyword and date before deletion

text: Move next Tuesday's standup to Wednesday at the same time
notes: Same time constraint should be preserved during reschedule

text: When am I free this Thursday afternoon?
notes: Afternoon typically maps to 12pm-6pm window

text: Block off the entire morning on Monday for deep work
notes: Morning = 9am-12pm by default; single attendee (self)

text: Delete all my events on December 25th
notes: May require multiple delete_event calls for each event found on that date

text: Push back the 2pm product review meeting by 30 minutes
notes: New start time should be 2:30pm; end time shifted proportionally

text: Find me a 2-hour window sometime next week for a strategy session
notes: Should scan the full next week range for a contiguous 2-hour slot

text: Add a reminder for my car insurance renewal on the 15th of next month
notes: All-day event or reminder-type event with no duration specified

text: Reschedule the client onboarding call from Monday to next Friday at 10am
notes: Explicit new date and time provided; should update both start and end

text: Create a recurring weekly team sync every Monday at 9am starting next week
notes: Recurrence rule: weekly on Monday; no end date specified

text: Remove the board meeting from my calendar
notes: No date given; may need to search for the most recent or upcoming matching event

text: Is there any gap in my schedule tomorrow between 10am and 2pm?
notes: Should check free slots within the specified time range on next day

text: Find a free 1-hour slot tomorrow afternoon and book a call with Emma
notes: Step 1: find_free_slot for tomorrow afternoon; Step 2: create_event using the returned slot with Emma as attendee

text: Cancel today's standup and reschedule it to tomorrow at the same time
notes: Step 1: delete today's standup; Step 2: create new event tomorrow preserving attendees and duration

text: Check if I'm free Friday at 2pm and if so book a 45-min review with the design team
notes: Conditional chain: only create event if slot is free; should handle the case where slot is busy

text: Move tomorrow's investor call to the next available free slot later this week
notes: Step 1: find next available free slot this week; Step 2: reschedule the investor call to that slot

text: Find a time this week when both Alex and Maya are free for a 30-minute sync and schedule it
notes: find_free_slot may need attendee availability; then create_event with both attendees

text: Delete the 4pm meeting today and find the next free 1-hour block this evening
notes: Step 1: delete 4pm event; Step 2: find free slot in remaining evening hours

text: Look up when our next planning session is and push it back by one day
notes: Ambiguous but interpreted as: find the planning session event, then reschedule it +1 day

text: If I have nothing scheduled Wednesday morning, create a 2-hour writing block at 9am
notes: Conditional: check free slot first; only create if Wednesday 9-11am is free

text: Reschedule all of next Monday's meetings to Tuesday
notes: Requires checking Tuesday availability for each meeting slot, then rescheduling each

text: Block the first free 3-hour window I have next week for conference prep
notes: find_free_slot with 3h duration constraint, then create_event with 'conference prep' title

text: Cancel the sprint planning on Thursday and let everyone know by sending updated invites for Friday at 10am
notes: delete Thursday event, create new Friday event with same attendees and updated time

text: Find a free slot for me and Tom next Tuesday and book a lunch meeting
notes: find_free_slot checking both users' availability around lunch hours, then create_event

text: Schedule a meeting with the team
notes: Ambiguous: missing date, time, duration, and which team members. Should ask for date/time at minimum

text: Move my meeting to next week
notes: Ambiguous: which meeting? What day and time next week? Needs clarification on both

text: Cancel the afternoon meeting
notes: Ambiguous: which day's afternoon? What if there are multiple afternoon meetings?

text: Set up a recurring event for our book club
notes: Missing: day of week, time, frequency (weekly/monthly?), duration, start date

text: Find me a free slot
notes: Completely underspecified: no date range, no duration, no time-of-day preference

text: Reschedule the demo
notes: No new date/time given, no indication of which demo if multiple exist

text: Book a call with the client for sometime next month
notes: Missing: which client, call duration, preferred time of day. 'Sometime' is vague

text: Add lunch to my calendar on Thursday
notes: Lunch time is ambiguous (12pm? 1pm?), duration unclear, attendees unknown

text: Schedule a workshop for next quarter
notes: Quarter is too broad a range; missing specific date, time, duration, attendees

text: Push back my next appointment
notes: No indication of how far to push it back; 'next appointment' needs to be resolved first

text: Create an event for my trip
notes: Missing: destination, dates, duration, whether it's one event or multiple travel legs

text: Book a room for the leadership offsite
notes: Unclear if this is a calendar event or a room booking system; missing date, time, location, attendees

text: When can we meet?
notes: Extremely vague: who is 'we'? What timeframe? What duration? What purpose?

text: Set up a team kickoff next Monday at 10am and also find a backup slot in case people aren't available
notes: Parallel: simultaneously create the primary event and search for an alternative slot

text: Cancel both the 10am and 3pm meetings today
notes: Two delete_event calls in parallel for the two distinct events

text: Schedule a standup at 9am Monday and a retrospective at 4pm Friday
notes: Two independent create_event calls for two different events

text: Find a free slot this week for a 1-hour call and a separate 30-min check-in
notes: Two parallel find_free_slot calls with different duration requirements

text: Reschedule the Monday design review to Wednesday and move the Thursday engineering sync to Friday
notes: Two independent reschedule operations that can run in parallel

text: Block tomorrow 9-11am for focused work and also find a time for a team lunch this week
notes: Parallel: create focus block event and find free lunch slot simultaneously

text: Delete next Monday's all-hands and reschedule the 1:1 with Maria from Tuesday to Wednesday
notes: Independent operations: delete one event, reschedule another — can run in parallel

text: What's my availability Monday and Tuesday next week?
notes: Two parallel find_free_slot calls for Monday and Tuesday respectively

text: Schedule a product review on Monday, a design critique on Wednesday, and a release planning on Friday all at 2pm
notes: Three parallel create_event calls for three distinct events

text: Cancel all three 1:1 meetings I have this week
notes: Three parallel delete_event calls after identifying each 1:1 event this week

text: Find a free slot for a 30-minute call today and book a 1-hour strategy meeting for next week simultaneously
notes: find_free_slot for today and create_event for next week are independent and run in parallel

text: Push back Monday's 9am meeting by an hour and also block out Monday afternoon for travel prep
notes: Reschedule one event and create a new blocking event simultaneously
